attributes.description: Alerts when the busy-to-total worker ratio exceeds 0.85. The worker pool is close to exhaustion — new connections will be queued or refused shortly.
attributes.name: [Apache OTel] High busy workers ratio

investigation_guide.blob:
## Apache high busy workers ratio

### What fired
`busy_workers / (busy_workers + idle_workers)` averaged above 0.85 during the evaluation window.

### Why it matters
Apache handles concurrent connections with a fixed worker pool (`MaxRequestWorkers`). Once utilisation exceeds ~85% the remaining idle pool is too small to absorb short bursts, and once the pool reaches 100% new connections are either queued or rejected depending on MPM configuration.

### Triage
1. Overview dashboard: confirm per-host utilisation and trend.
2. Check `apache.request.time` rate / `apache.requests` rate for latency increase — slow backends extend worker hold time and drive this metric.
3. Inspect `apache.connections.async` (event MPM) — keep-alive accumulation is a common driver.
4. Rule out traffic spikes (compare `apache.requests` rate to baseline).

### Remediation
- Increase `MaxRequestWorkers` (raising `ServerLimit` if needed).
- Reduce per-request worker hold time by fixing slow backends or enabling mod_proxy / buffering.
- Scale Apache horizontally.

### Tuning
- Threshold `> 0.85` is documented as the warning band. Use 0.80 for conservative tiers, 0.90 for aggressive.

esqlQuery.esql:
// Alert triggers when the ratio of busy workers to total workers exceeds the threshold.
// High busy worker ratio indicates the server is near capacity and may start rejecting connections.
// The alert is grouped by host name.
// You can adjust the threshold value by modifying the busy_ratio in the WHERE clause (default: > 0.85 = 85%).
FROM metrics-apachereceiver.otel-*
| STATS busy_workers = AVG(metrics.apache.workers) WHERE attributes.state == "busy",
        idle_workers = AVG(metrics.apache.workers) WHERE attributes.state == "idle"
  BY resource.attributes.host.name
| WHERE busy_workers IS NOT NULL AND idle_workers IS NOT NULL
| EVAL total_workers = busy_workers + idle_workers
| WHERE total_workers > 0
| EVAL busy_ratio = busy_workers / total_workers
| WHERE busy_ratio > 0.85
| EVAL busy_ratio = ROUND(busy_ratio, 3)
| KEEP resource.attributes.host.name, busy_workers, idle_workers, total_workers, busy_ratio
| SORT busy_ratio DESC
